metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4568
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 2A shows the colocalization of Daam1 with the presynaptic marker SV2 and Fig. 2B the colocalization with the postsynaptic marker PSD-95. A clear assignment to the pre- or postsynaptic side is not possible.. Experimental description: "To further evaluate the localization of Daam1 in neurons, we performed immunostainings on dissociated hippocampal cultures from rat brain.", p. 65

"Daam1 antibodies were generated by immunizing rabbits using a glutathione S-transferase-Daam1 peptide corresponding
to amino acids 902-1078 of human Daam1 [9], a region with 95% sequence identity to the predicted sequence of the murine ortholog mDaam1. The Daam1 antibody recognized a protein of approximately 115-120 kDa in a western blot analysis of mouse brain proteins (Fig. 1A), which is in close agreement with the predicted size of 123 kDa for mDaam1 and similar in size to a myc-tagged Daam1 cDNA expressed by transfected HEK293T cells (Fig. 1A)."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
